data.title: test-merge-conflict-regression.sh: code+ticket merge conflict review gate exits 0 instead of 1
data.description: CI Hook Tests failure. test_code_and_ticket_merge_conflict_requires_review expects the review gate to exit 1 (blocking) when both code and ticket files have merge conflicts, but the gate exits 0 (pass). The hook should require review for code file merge conflicts even when ticket files are also conflicted.
